user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new orientation topic with description, location, delivery mode, duration and number of evaluation questions, so that new hires have structured induction content
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Topics screen; When I click Add new topic and enter the topic details; Then the new topic is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view orientation topics in a list showing topic, description, locations, delivery mode, duration and evaluation question count, so that I can review the induction curriculum
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Topics screen; When the page loads; Then topics are listed with all configured columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing orientation topic, so that I can keep the induction content accurate and up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Topics screen; When I click Edit on a topic row; Then I can modify and save the topic details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set a topic delivery mode and duration, so that the orientation session is scheduled and delivered correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a topic; When I select a delivery mode and enter a duration in minutes; Then the values are saved with the topic

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to specify the number of questions in the topic evaluation, so that new hires are assessed appropriately after the topic
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a topic; When I enter the number of questions in evaluation; Then the evaluation size is saved for the topic

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the topics list, so that I can navigate all topics and see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Topics screen; When I use the paging controls or click Refresh; Then the list navigates or reloads accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step or cancel from the Orientation Topics screen, so that I can continue or exit the setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Topics screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I advance to the next step or exit without saving
